details.mistral_response_summary: Mistral AI responded with privacy protection advice in Korean - warning user not to share personal information like resident registration numbers, suggesting contacting official agencies instead.
details.console_error_details: Only 1 Intercom-related issue (pre-existing, not APF related)
details.network_requests: 18 requests, all HTTP 200, h2 protocol, 16.6 KB transferred

analysis.observation: APF did NOT intercept or modify the Mistral /api/chat SSE stream. The original Mistral response was delivered intact without any APF warning injection. Possible causes: (1) APF pattern matching did not trigger on this request - keyword '주민등록번호' may not be in the filter DB, (2) h2_hold_request=1 mode may not be correctly holding the upstream response to inject the warning, (3) the tRPC SSE template may not be correctly matching the /api/chat path or content-type, (4) APF module may not be active for this service on the Etap bridge.
analysis.comparison_with_257: Request #257 (earlier Mistral check-warning) resulted in ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED with 'Oops, Something Fishy' error. This time with h2_mode=2 (keep-alive) the connection stayed open but APF warning was not injected at all - the original AI response passed through unmodified.
analysis.verdict: tRPC SSE warning template is NOT working. APF either failed to detect the sensitive keyword or failed to inject the warning into the SSE stream.
